title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Hyogoro, Kinemon, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What in the world could have happened

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We are the retainers of open Kozuki!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have come here from 20 years in the past!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: To see our Lord's dream fulfilled!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To burn out what little remains of the lives we have, the lives that ended that day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But we cannot with this many!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look! At the skies, at the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've been abandoned by Heaven itself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why should we expect any different from men?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: something must have happened to them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, there seems to be a small rowboat here.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 38 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
